zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Betham I於大約1238年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德貝坦時，他的父親Sir Robert de Betham32歲，母親Mrs. Felicia De Betham22歲。他於大約1272年與Emma le Fleming在英國英格蘭薩默塞特貝坦結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1308年住在英國維斯特莫藍德。他去世在英國英格蘭恩布利亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Betham I于大约1238年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德貝坦时，他的父亲Sir Robert de Betham32岁，母亲Mrs. Felicia De Betham22岁。他于大约1272年与Emma le Fleming在英国英格兰薩默塞特貝坦结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1308年住在英国維斯特莫藍德。他去世在英国英格兰恩布利亞。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Betham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Beetham
meanings: English: habitational name from Beetham in Westmorland, probably named from a plural form, bjóthum, of the Old Norse element bjóth ‘embankment, table’, i.e. ‘(place near) the embankments’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Betham I was born about 1238, in Beetham, Westmorland, England, his father, Sir Robert de Betham, was 32 and his mother, Mrs. Felicia De Betham, was 22. He married Emma le Fleming about 1272, in Betham, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Westmorland, England in 1308. He died in Cumbria, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Betham I est né environ 1238, à Beetham, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert de Betham, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Felicia De Betham, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Emma le Fleming environ 1272, à Betham, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Westmorland, Angleterre en 1308. Il est décédé à Cumbria, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Betham I um 1238 in Beetham, Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert de Betham 32 und seine Mutter Mrs. Felicia De Betham 22. Er hat um 1272 in Betham, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Emma le Fleming geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1308 hat er in Westmorland, England gelebt. Er starb in Cumbria, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Betham I è nato il circa 1238 nel Beetham, Westmorland, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert de Betham, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Felicia De Betham, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Emma le Fleming circa 1272, nel Betham, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Westmorland, England nel 1308. Morì nel Cumbria, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Betham Iが約1238年にイギリスウエストモーランドビーサムで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Bethamは32歳，母Mrs. Felicia De Bethamは22歳であった。約1272年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトベサムでEmma le Flemingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1308年にはイギリスウエストモーランドに住んでいた。彼はイギリスイギリスクウンブリアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Betham I(이)가 대략 1238년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 브이섬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert de Betham(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Felicia De Betham(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1272년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 베섬에서 Emma le Fleming(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1308년도에 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 살았다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 c브리아에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Betham I nasceu aproximadamente 1238, em Beetham, Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert de Betham, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Felicia De Betham, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma le Fleming aproximadamente 1272, em Betham, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Westmorland, Inglaterra em 1308. Ele faleceu em Cumbria, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Betham I родился около 1238 г. в местности битам, вестморланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert de Betham было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Felicia De Betham, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma le Fleming около 1272 г. в местности бетам, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности вестморланд, Англия в 1308 году. Он умер в местности кумбря, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.from 1308 to 1312: mai le 1308 e o'o I le 1312

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Betham I nació aproximadamente 1238, en Beetham, Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert de Betham, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mrs. Felicia De Betham, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Emma le Fleming aproximadamente 1272, en Betham, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Westmorland, Inglaterra en 1308. Murió en Cumbria, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
